# Arbeids- og inkluderingsdepartementet

*70 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Lovdata | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|---------|-----------|
| [Lov om 1 og 17 mai som høgtidsdager](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1947-04-26-1.md) | Lov om 1 og 17 mai | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1947-04-26-1) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1947-04-26-1.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1947-04-26-1.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1947-04-26-1.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1947-04-26-1.md) |
| [Lov om Norges Krigsskaderåd](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1951-07-06-4.md) | Lov om Norges Krigsskaderåd | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1951-07-06-4) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1951-07-06-4.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1951-07-06-4.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1951-07-06-4.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1951-07-06-4.md) |
| [Lov om Statens pensjonskasse](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1949-07-28-26.md) | Statens pensjonskasseloven – stpkl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1949-07-28-26) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1949-07-28-26.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1949-07-28-26.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1949-07-28-26.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1949-07-28-26.md) |
| [Lov om aldersgrenser for statsansatte m.fl.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1956-12-21-1.md) | Lov om aldersgrenser for statsansatte m.fl. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1956-12-21-1) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1956-12-21-1.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1956-12-21-1.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1956-12-21-1.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1956-12-21-1.md) |
| [Lov om allmenngjøring av bestemmelser i tariffavtale om europeiske samarbeidsutv](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1996-08-23-63.md) | Lov om europeiske samarbeidsutvalg m.v. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1996-08-23-63) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1996-08-23-63.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1996-08-23-63.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1996-08-23-63.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1996-08-23-63.md) |
| [Lov om allmenngjøring av tariffavtaler m.v. (allmenngjøringsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1993-06-04-58.md) | Allmenngjøringsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1993-06-04-58) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1993-06-04-58.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1993-06-04-58.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1993-06-04-58.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1993-06-04-58.md) |
| [Lov om anke til Trygderetten (trygderettsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1966-12-16-9.md) | Trygderettsloven – trrl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1966-12-16-9) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1966-12-16-9.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1966-12-16-9.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1966-12-16-9.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1966-12-16-9.md) |
| [Lov om arbeids- og velferdsforvaltningen (arbeids- og velferdsforvaltningsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2006-06-16-20.md) | Nav-loven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2006-06-16-20) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2006-06-16-20.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2006-06-16-20.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2006-06-16-20.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2006-06-16-20.md) |
| [Lov om arbeidsmarkedstjenester (arbeidsmarkedsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-12-10-76.md) | Arbeidsmarkedsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2004-12-10-76) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2004-12-10-76.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2004-12-10-76.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2004-12-10-76.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2004-12-10-76.md) |
| [Lov om arbeidsmiljø, arbeidstid og stillingsvern mv. (arbeidsmiljøloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-06-17-62.md) | Arbeidsmiljøloven – aml | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2005-06-17-62) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-06-17-62.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2005-06-17-62.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2005-06-17-62.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2005-06-17-62.md) |
| [Lov om arbeidstvister (arbeidstvistloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2012-01-27-9.md) | Arbeidstvistloven – arbtvl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2012-01-27-9) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2012-01-27-9.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2012-01-27-9.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2012-01-27-9.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2012-01-27-9.md) |
| [Lov om avtalefestet pensjon for arbeidstakere med rett til medlemskap i Pensjons](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1994-07-01-49.md) | Lov om AFP for apotekvirksomhet | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1994-07-01-49) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1994-07-01-49.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1994-07-01-49.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1994-07-01-49.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1994-07-01-49.md) |
| [Lov om avtalefestet pensjon for medlemmer av Statens pensjonskasse](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2010-06-25-28.md) | Lov om AFP for medlemmer av Statens pensjonskasse | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2010-06-25-28) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2010-06-25-28.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2010-06-25-28.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2010-06-25-28.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2010-06-25-28.md) |
| [Lov om den europeiske arbeidsmarknadsstyresmakta (ELA-lova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-04-10-8.md) | ELA-lova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-04-10-8) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-04-10-8.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2025-04-10-8.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-04-10-8.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-04-10-8.md) |
| [Lov om endringar i folketrygdlova og enkelte andre lover (oppfølging av tiltak i](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-12-22-117.md) | Endringslov til folketrygdlova og enkelte andre lover | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-12-22-117) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-12-22-117.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2025-12-22-117.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-12-22-117.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-12-22-117.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i allmenngjøringsloven (anvendelse på Svalbard)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-03-28-4.md) | Endringslov til allmenngjøringsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-03-28-4) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-03-28-4.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2025-03-28-4.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-03-28-4.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-03-28-4.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i arbeidsmiljøloven (krav til det psykososiale arbeidsmiljøet)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-37.md) | Endringslov til arbeidsmiljøloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-37) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-37.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2025-06-20-37.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-37.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-37.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i arbeidsmiljøloven og sosialtjenesteloven (adgang til midlerti](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-04-24-20.md) | Endringslov til arbeidsmiljøloven og sosialtjenesteloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2015-04-24-20) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2015-04-24-20.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2015-04-24-20.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2015-04-24-20.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2015-04-24-20.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i arbeidsmiljøloven, lov om aldersgrenser for statsansatte m.fl](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-05-27-17.md) | Endringslov til arbeidsmiljøloven, lov om aldersgrenser for statsansatte m.fl. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-05-27-17) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-05-27-17.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2025-05-27-17.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-05-27-17.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-05-27-17.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i barnetrygdloven og midlertidige endringer i lovverket som føl](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-06-25-53.md) | Endringslov til barnetrygdloven mv. (Ukraina) | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2024-06-25-53) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2024-06-25-53.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2024-06-25-53.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2024-06-25-53.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2024-06-25-53.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i barnevernsloven, straffeloven, passloven og ID-kortloven (utr](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-12-22-115.md) | Endringslov til barnevernsloven, straffeloven, passloven og ID-kortloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-12-22-115) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-12-22-115.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2025-12-22-115.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-12-22-115.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-12-22-115.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i folketrygdloven (ny alderspensjon)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-06-05-32.md) | Endringslov til folketrygdloven (ny alderspensjon) | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2009-06-05-32) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2009-06-05-32.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2009-06-05-32.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2009-06-05-32.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2009-06-05-32.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i folketrygdloven (ny uføretrygd og alderspensjon til uføre)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2011-12-16-59.md) | Endringslov til folketrygdloven (ny uføretrygd) | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2011-12-16-59) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2011-12-16-59.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2011-12-16-59.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2011-12-16-59.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2011-12-16-59.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i folketrygdloven (nye etterlatteytelser)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-12-18-139.md) | Endringslov til folketrygdloven (nye etterlatteytelser) | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2020-12-18-139) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-12-18-139.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2020-12-18-139.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2020-12-18-139.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2020-12-18-139.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i folketrygdloven (yrkessykdommer og elektronisk melding av yrk](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-10-30.md) | Endringslov til folketrygdloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-10-30) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-10-30.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2025-06-10-30.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-10-30.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-10-30.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i folketrygdloven mv. (arbeidsavklaringspenger og tilleggsstøna](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-43.md) | Endringslov til folketrygdloven mv. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2017-06-16-43) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-06-16-43.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2017-06-16-43.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2017-06-16-43.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2017-06-16-43.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i folketrygdloven og enkelte andre lover](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-12-20-84.md) | Endringslov til folketrygdloven og enkelte andre lover | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2019-12-20-84) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2019-12-20-84.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2019-12-20-84.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2019-12-20-84.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2019-12-20-84.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i integreringsloven mv. (økt arbeidsretting og formell opplærin](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-35.md) | Endringslov til integreringsloven mv. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-35) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-35.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2025-06-20-35.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-35.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-35.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i lov om Statens pensjonskasse og enkelte andre lover (ny uføre](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2014-03-07-5.md) | Endringslov til lov om Statens pensjonskasse mfl. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2014-03-07-5) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2014-03-07-5.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2014-03-07-5.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2014-03-07-5.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2014-03-07-5.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i lov om Statens pensjonskasse og enkelte andre lover (nye pens](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-10-31.md) | Endringslov til lov om Statens pensjonskasse mv. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-10-31) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-10-31.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2025-06-10-31.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-10-31.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-10-31.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i lov om Statens pensjonskasse, folketrygdloven og i enkelte an](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2014-12-19-73.md) | Endringslov til ftrl. og div. pensjonslover | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2014-12-19-73) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2014-12-19-73.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2014-12-19-73.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2014-12-19-73.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2014-12-19-73.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i trygderettsloven mv. (ankeerklæring til Trygderetten, avgjøre](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-38.md) | Endringslov til trygderettsloven mv. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-38) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-38.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2025-06-20-38.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-38.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-38.md) |
| [Lov om erstatning for krigsskade på eiendom og interesse [krigsskadeerstatningsl](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1953-07-17-2.md) | Krigsskadeerstatningsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1953-07-17-2) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1953-07-17-2.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1953-07-17-2.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1953-07-17-2.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1953-07-17-2.md) |
| [Lov om ferie [ferieloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1988-04-29-21.md) | Ferieloven – feriel | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1988-04-29-21) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1988-04-29-21.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1988-04-29-21.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1988-04-29-21.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1988-04-29-21.md) |
| [Lov om folketrygd (folketrygdloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1997-02-28-19.md) | Folketrygdloven – ftrl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1997-02-28-19) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1997-02-28-19.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1997-02-28-19.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1997-02-28-19.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1997-02-28-19.md) |
| [Lov om fri rørsle av arbeidstakarar innanfor EØS mv. (EØS-arbeidstakarlova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2012-12-14-81.md) | EØS-arbeidstakarlova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2012-12-14-81) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2012-12-14-81.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2012-12-14-81.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2012-12-14-81.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2012-12-14-81.md) |
| [Lov om informasjonstilgang m.m. for Ekstremismekommisjonen](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2022-12-20-97.md) | Lov om informasjonstilgang m.m. for Ekstremismekommisjonen | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2022-12-20-97) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2022-12-20-97.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2022-12-20-97.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2022-12-20-97.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2022-12-20-97.md) |
| [Lov om informasjonstilgang mv. for utvalget for ekstern gransking av saken knytt](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-12-20-85.md) | Lov om informasjonstilgang mv. for NAV-granskingsutvalget | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2019-12-20-85) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2019-12-20-85.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2019-12-20-85.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2019-12-20-85.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2019-12-20-85.md) |
| [Lov om integrering gjennom opplæring, utdanning og arbeid (integreringsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-11-06-127.md) | Integreringsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2020-11-06-127) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-11-06-127.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2020-11-06-127.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2020-11-06-127.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2020-11-06-127.md) |
| [Lov om kompensasjonsordning for kjemikalieskadde oljepionerar](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-12-22-116.md) | Lov om kompensasjonsordning for kjemikalieskadde oljepionerar | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-12-22-116) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-12-22-116.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2025-12-22-116.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-12-22-116.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-12-22-116.md) |
| [Lov om krigspensjonering for hjemmestyrkepersonell og sivilpersoner](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1946-12-13-22.md) | Lov om krigspensjonering for sivile m.v. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1946-12-13-22) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1946-12-13-22.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1946-12-13-22.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1946-12-13-22.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1946-12-13-22.md) |
| [Lov om krigspensjonering for militærpersoner](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1946-12-13-21.md) | Lov om krigspensjon for militærpersoner | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1946-12-13-21) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1946-12-13-21.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1946-12-13-21.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1946-12-13-21.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1946-12-13-21.md) |
| [Lov om lønnsnemnd i arbeidstvister (lønnsnemndloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2012-01-27-10.md) | Lønnsnemndloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2012-01-27-10) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2012-01-27-10.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2012-01-27-10.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2012-01-27-10.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2012-01-27-10.md) |
| [Lov om lønnsplikt under permittering (permitteringslønnsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1988-05-06-22.md) | Permitteringslønnsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1988-05-06-22) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1988-05-06-22.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1988-05-06-22.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1988-05-06-22.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1988-05-06-22.md) |
| [Lov om merkning av vekten på tunge kolli som fraktes med fartøi](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1932-04-22-1.md) | Lov om merkning på tunge kolli | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1932-04-22-1) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1932-04-22-1.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1932-04-22-1.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1932-04-22-1.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1932-04-22-1.md) |
| [Lov om norsk statsborgerskap (statsborgerloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-06-10-51.md) | Statsborgerloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2005-06-10-51) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-06-10-51.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2005-06-10-51.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2005-06-10-51.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2005-06-10-51.md) |
| [Lov om offentlige organers ansvar for bruk av tolk mv. (tolkeloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2021-06-11-79.md) | Tolkeloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2021-06-11-79) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2021-06-11-79.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2021-06-11-79.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2021-06-11-79.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2021-06-11-79.md) |
| [Lov om opphevelse av lov 9. november 1956 om pensjonsordning for åremålstilsatte](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1982-05-21-29.md) | Lov om opph. av pensjonsordn. for åremålstilsatte | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1982-05-21-29) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1982-05-21-29.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1982-05-21-29.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1982-05-21-29.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1982-05-21-29.md) |
| [Lov om pensjonering av militært tilsatte som etter søknad er gitt avskjed med re](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1957-05-03.md) | Lov om pensjonering av militært tilsatte | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1957-05-03) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1957-05-03.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1957-05-03.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1957-05-03.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1957-05-03.md) |
| [Lov om pensjonsordning for Stortingets ombudsmann for forvaltningen](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1966-05-06.md) | Lov om pensjonsordning for sivilombudsmannen | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1966-05-06) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1966-05-06.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1966-05-06.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1966-05-06.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1966-05-06.md) |
| [Lov om pensjonsordning for apotekvirksomhet mv. [apotekpensjonsloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1953-06-26-11.md) | Apotekpensjonsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1953-06-26-11) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1953-06-26-11.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1953-06-26-11.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1953-06-26-11.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1953-06-26-11.md) |
| [Lov om pensjonsordning for arbeidstakere til sjøs](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1948-12-03-7.md) | Pensjonsordning for arbeidstakere til sjøs – sjømptrl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1948-12-03-7) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1948-12-03-7.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1948-12-03-7.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1948-12-03-7.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1948-12-03-7.md) |
| [Lov om pensjonsordning for ballettdansere, sangsolister og korsangere ved Den No](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1998-08-21-65.md) | Operapensjonsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1998-08-21-65) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1998-08-21-65.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1998-08-21-65.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1998-08-21-65.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1998-08-21-65.md) |
| [Lov om pensjonsordning for ledsagere i utenrikstjenesten](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1999-01-15-1.md) | Lov om ledsagerpensjon i utenrikstjenesten | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1999-01-15-1) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1999-01-15-1.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1999-01-15-1.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1999-01-15-1.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1999-01-15-1.md) |
| [Lov om pensjonsordning for oppdragstaker i beredskapshjem eller spesialisert fos](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2010-02-12-4.md) | Lov om pensjon for oppdragstaker i barnevernet | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2010-02-12-4) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2010-02-12-4.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2010-02-12-4.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2010-02-12-4.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2010-02-12-4.md) |
| [Lov om pensjonsordning for stortingsrepresentanter og regjeringsmedlemmer (stort](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2011-12-16-60.md) | Stortings- og regjeringspensjonsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2011-12-16-60) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2011-12-16-60.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2011-12-16-60.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2011-12-16-60.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2011-12-16-60.md) |
| [Lov om pensjonsordning for sykepleiere [sykepleierpensjonsloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1962-06-22-12.md) | Sykepleierpensjonsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1962-06-22-12) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1962-06-22-12.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1962-06-22-12.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1962-06-22-12.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1962-06-22-12.md) |
| [Lov om pensjonstrygd for fiskere [fiskerpensjonsloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1957-06-28-12.md) | Fiskerpensjonsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1957-06-28-12) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1957-06-28-12.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1957-06-28-12.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1957-06-28-12.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1957-06-28-12.md) |
| [Lov om samordning av pensjons- og trygdeytelser (samordningsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1957-07-06-26.md) | Samordningsloven – samordl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1957-07-06-26) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1957-07-06-26.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1957-07-06-26.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1957-07-06-26.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1957-07-06-26.md) |
| [Lov om sosiale tjenester i arbeids- og velferdsforvaltningen (sosialtjenestelove](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-12-18-131.md) | Sosialtjenesteloven – sotjl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2009-12-18-131) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2009-12-18-131.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2009-12-18-131.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2009-12-18-131.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2009-12-18-131.md) |
| [Lov om statsgaranti for lønnskrav ved konkurs m.v. [lønnsgarantiloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1973-12-14-61.md) | Lønnsgarantiloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1973-12-14-61) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1973-12-14-61.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1973-12-14-61.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1973-12-14-61.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1973-12-14-61.md) |
| [Lov om statstilskott til arbeidstakere som tar ut avtalefestet pensjon i privat ](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2010-02-19-5.md) | AFP-tilskottsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2010-02-19-5) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2010-02-19-5.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2010-02-19-5.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2010-02-19-5.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2010-02-19-5.md) |
| [Lov om stønad ved krigsskade på person [krigsskadestønadsloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1954-11-26-3.md) | Krigsskadestønadsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1954-11-26-3) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1954-11-26-3.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1954-11-26-3.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1954-11-26-3.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1954-11-26-3.md) |
| [Lov om supplerande stønad til personar med kort butid i Noreg](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-04-29-21.md) | Lov om supplerande stønad ved kort butid | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2005-04-29-21) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-04-29-21.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2005-04-29-21.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2005-04-29-21.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2005-04-29-21.md) |
| [Lov om tillegg til 1) lov om krigspensjonering for militærpersoner av 13. desemb](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1968-03-22-2.md) | Tilleggslov om krigspensjonering | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1968-03-22-2) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1968-03-22-2.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1968-03-22-2.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1968-03-22-2.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1968-03-22-2.md) |
| [Lov om tillegg til lov 28. juli 1949 om Statens pensjonskasse [høyesterettspensj](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1982-05-21-25.md) | Høyesterettspensjonsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1982-05-21-25) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1982-05-21-25.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1982-05-21-25.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1982-05-21-25.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1982-05-21-25.md) |
| [Lov om tillegg til lov om Statens pensjonskasse av 28. juli 1949](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1956-11-09-1.md) | Tilleggslov om Statens pensjonskasse | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1956-11-09-1) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1956-11-09-1.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1956-11-09-1.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1956-11-09-1.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1956-11-09-1.md) |
| [Lov om ulykkestrygd for arbeidere ved norske bedrifter på Svalbard](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1947-06-27-10.md) | Lov om ulykkestrygd på Svalbard | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1947-06-27-10) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1947-06-27-10.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1947-06-27-10.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1947-06-27-10.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1947-06-27-10.md) |
| [Lov om yrkesskadetrygd [yrkesskadetrygdloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1958-12-12-10.md) | Yrkesskadetrygdloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1958-12-12-10) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1958-12-12-10.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1958-12-12-10.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1958-12-12-10.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1958-12-12-10.md) |
| [Midlertidig lov om tillegg til lover av 13. desember 1946 om 1) Krigspensjonerin](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1951-06-29-34.md) | Tilleggslov om krigspensjonering | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1951-06-29-34) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1951-06-29-34.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1951-06-29-34.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1951-06-29-34.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1951-06-29-34.md) |
